title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-20
body: The moderation team processed 6 reports today. Two members were banned: one for high-severity phishing spam (links posted across multiple channels) and one for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. One member received a formal warning for suspicious automation behavior and is under monitoring. Two reports involving trusted community volunteers were reviewed and closed without sanction per escalation policy — one was a moderation disagreement requiring human review, and one was identified as a coordinated false-positive brigading attempt. One low-severity formatting report was closed with no action. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and fair.
